displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows review-only Ardyn status without controls.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Locus may display Ardyn phase status, blocked runtime state, and readiness summaries as static review metadata only.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Expose status text and blocked reason as readable static content; do not attach keyboard activation to blocked controls.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render phase status, current posture, and blocked runtime state as read-only labels.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future Locus control-surface contract plus explicit Ardyn command/runtime authorization.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Displays review artifacts as non-authorizing evidence.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Locus may show review artifact summaries, classifications, and rejection reasons without treating them as approvals or grants.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Keep artifact sections navigable by heading and label every rejection reason as text.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render artifact fields, source phase, and non-authorizing proof flags as static evidence.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future human review workflow contract with separate approval-decision and grant phases.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows capability descriptions without invoking tools.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Locus may display Ardyn capability names, tags, scopes, and blocked authorization state without adapter calls or tool execution.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Expose capability name, status, and blocked reason in the same focus region.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render capability metadata, requested scopes, and blocked execution status.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future capability invocation contract with explicit adapter, connector, MCP/task, and secret boundaries.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows blocked command/runtime status.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Locus may display that runtime and command exposure are unavailable, including zero-stdout failure expectations.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Announce unavailable status and reason without presenting the indicator as a button.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render blocked command state and static error semantics.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future command-exposure approval and runtime-enable contract.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows future compose/inbox status as metadata only.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Locus may display future Secure Drop compose and inbox placeholders only as unavailable content-fabric capability references.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Label compose and inbox placeholders as unavailable; do not expose file picker or send semantics.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render unavailable compose/inbox metadata and future-contract notes.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future canonical content-fabric Secure Drop contract with separate crypto, transport, inbox, file, connector, and secret authorization.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows orchestration readiness without orchestration.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Multiverse may display project/world readiness cards derived from Ardyn metadata without starting tasks, registry connections, or orchestration loops.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Keep card status, blocked reason, and future contract in text, independent of color.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render world/project readiness status and blocked runtime indicators.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future Multiverse orchestration contract with explicit task, registry, schedule, and process-control authorization.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Displays capability badge state without tool use.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Multiverse may show visible AI capability badges that distinguish metadata availability from executable capability.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Badge text must include the status word and not rely on color alone.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render visible badges for capability status and authorization blockers.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future visible capability interaction contract with tool, MCP, connector, and adapter authorization.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows task wrapper state without task execution.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Multiverse may render task/capability wrapper status cards that show planned, blocked, and authorization-required states only.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Use static region labels for task status; do not hide activation behind card click handlers.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render task wrapper metadata and blocked task runtime state.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future task wrapper execution contract with separate MCP/task, approval, transcript, and audit-write authorization.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows candidate adapter status as review metadata.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Multiverse may display citizen and adapter candidate badges without connector discovery, adapter runtime behavior, or registry scanning.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Expose candidate state and blocked connector reason as text adjacent to the badge.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render candidate badge metadata, source artifact type, and blocked connector status.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future adapter candidate contract with connector discovery, registry, service-scan, and credential boundaries.

displayFixtureEntries.shortDescription: Shows registry, websocket, MCP, and task runtime blocks.
displayFixtureEntries.longDescription: Multiverse may display registry, websocket, MCP, and task runtime indicators only as blocked status metadata.

accessibilityFields.keyboardScreenReaderDisplayNotes: Announce each blocked runtime category explicitly and keep the indicator static by default.

displayFixtureEntries.allowedDisplayBehavior: Render blocked registry, websocket, MCP, and task runtime categories.
displayFixtureEntries.requiredFutureContractBeforeInteractivit: A future registry/websocket/MCP/task runtime authorization contract.

topDisplayFixtureSchemaGaps: The boundary defines fixture schema requirements, but no Locus or Multiverse UI fixture files are implemented by Ardyn.
No browser, rendering, WCAG automation, or visual regression harness exists in Ardyn.
No consumer-owned fixture conformance runner, interactive approval contract, or command/runtime control contract exists.
Secure Drop and Multiverse registry/websocket/MCP/task fixture semantics remain metadata-only blocked indicators.
